en-US.summary: TheWatch Safety - Voice-activated personal safety, SOS alerts, check-ins, and emergency response coordination.
examplePhrases: Alexa, tell The Watch I need help
Alexa, ask The Watch to check in
en-US.name: The Watch Safety
en-US.description: The Watch Safety is your voice-activated personal safety companion. Trigger emergency SOS alerts, check in with your safety network, monitor your status, manage emergency contacts, and coordinate with nearby volunteer responders -- all through natural voice commands on your Alexa device. The Watch works alongside the mobile app to provide 24/7 safety coverage. Features include: emergency SOS alerts that notify your contacts and nearby responders, scheduled and on-demand check-ins, status reports, emergency phrase configuration, volunteer responder coordination, silent duress signaling, and multi-language support. In an emergency, simply say 'Alexa, tell The Watch I need help' and your safety network is immediately activated.

es-US.summary: TheWatch Safety - Seguridad personal activada por voz, alertas SOS, registros y coordinacion de respuesta de emergencia.
examplePhrases: Alexa, dile a The Watch que necesito ayuda
Alexa, pide a The Watch que me registre
es-US.name: The Watch Safety
es-US.description: The Watch Safety es tu companero de seguridad personal activado por voz. Activa alertas SOS de emergencia, registrate con tu red de seguridad, monitorea tu estado, gestiona contactos de emergencia y coordina con voluntarios cercanos, todo a traves de comandos de voz naturales en tu dispositivo Alexa.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: 1. Link your Watch account via the Alexa app (Account Linking). 2. Say 'Alexa, open The Watch' to launch. 3. Test SOS: say 'I need help' then 'yes' to confirm. 4. Test check-in: say 'I'm okay'. 5. Test status: say 'what's my status'. 6. Test cancel: say 'cancel alert'. 7. Test silent duress: say 'update my settings'.
